description: You are a virologist analyzing the ribosomal frameshift region of the HIV-1 virus using the reference genome at ~/UGENE_Data/virology/hiv_genome.gb. Identify the nucleotide overlap between the 'gag' and 'pol' CDS features. Create a new annotation for this overlap region with the Feature Key 'misc_feature' and a 'note' qualifier set to 'gag_pol_overlap'. Save the updated sequence to ~/UGENE_Data/virology/results/hiv_annotated.gb. Export the nucleotide sequence of the overlap region in FASTA format to ~/UGENE_Data/virology/results/frameshift_region.fasta. Create a summary report at ~/UGENE_Data/virology/results/frameshift_report.txt containing the start coordinate, end coordinate, and total length of the overlap in base pairs.
